J-01.name: Run a backtest from natural language
J-01.note: No regression from the iter-2 symbol/timeframe control rewiring (highest regression risk: this change touches the exact controls J-01 sets). Submitted the NL RSI strategy with the endpoint-backed BTC/USDT + 1h controls (timeframe write-path exercised 4h->1h): -7.81% / 39 trades / 49% WR / 1.69 SR, equity curve + 39-row trades table rendered, new run_id e554838d appended (4th). Persisted backtestParams = symbol:"BTC/USDT", timeframe:"1h" — combobox/<select> write the exact unchanged string format /api/run-backtest consumes; NO transform introduced (verified in git diff: update('timeframe', e.target.value) writes raw server value). UT-J-01 PASS.

J-02.name: Inspect and browse run history
J-02.note: Smoke no-regression confirmed. Opened a distinct prior session from the Sessions list; detail view reloaded full prior-run detail entirely different from the pre-click view: 115-trade table, Date Range 2023-01-01–2023-12-31, ALPHA -191.69%, Strategy Script + its own equity curve. Spec/metrics/trades all reloaded per acceptance. The deferred GET /api/sessions/{id} eager-load anti-goal (session_routes.py:142-171) is unchanged/pre-existing — frontend-only iter did not touch session_routes.py — so J-02 itself stays positively passing while the anti-goal fix is deferred to a subsequent full iteration. UT-J-02 PASS.

J-03.name: Walk-forward validation
J-03.note: Smoke no-regression confirmed. From a completed run's detail view set IS/OOS (6/3) and clicked WF Re-run: WFE badge recomputed 0.53 -> 1.26 (>=0.5 green ✓), OOS Return -11.71% -> -7.22% (fresh computation), per-window table (#/IS Period/OOS Period/IS Return/OOS Return/IS Sharpe/OOS Sharpe/IS/OOS Trades with real 2023- ranges) + Combined OOS Equity Curve (3 windows chained) all render. The control rewiring did not regress walk-forward. UT-J-03 PASS.

J-04.name: AI insights
J-04.note: Smoke no-regression confirmed (primary acceptance: >=1 ranked suggestion renders). browser-QA reports 7 ranked suggestions on a completed run (Add Mean Reversion Exit / Use Higher-Timeframe Trend / Tighten Adaptive Stops / Optimize RSI Window / Add Volatility Floor / Regime-Based Entry Filter / Increase Position Size). EVIDENCE NOTE: the dedicated UT-J-04-result.png is a byte-identical duplicate of UT-J-03-result.png (both 223797 B, showing the walk-forward panel, not the insights pane) — the insights capability is instead independently corroborated by the ranked suggestion pills visible in UT-J-05-result.png and UT-J-01-result.png from this same iteration, and a frontend-only symbol/timeframe change cannot plausibly regress AI insights. CARRIED SOFT GAP (open since iter-0): the conditional sub-clause 'suggestions are OOS-aware when walk-forward data exists' is still NOT separately asserted — explicitly deferred by the iter-2 spec to the subsequent full-depth iteration's QA. Must be confirmed (post-walk-forward insights regeneration) before GOAL_ACHIEVED; not a blocker for CONTINUE.

J-05.name: Reference data loads
J-05.note: NEWLY PASSING (was failing since iter-0; target journey of iter-2). Pure frontend wiring fix in apps/frontend/src/components/BacktestConfigBar.tsx (git diff: +97/-21, single file, no backend touched). Symbol control -> native combobox <input list="symbol-options"> + <datalist> populated from GET /api/symbols (26 BASE/USDT pairs, byte-identical to live payload); symbolOptions initializes to [] with NO hardcoded 26-element fallback, so a populated 26-item datalist can only have come from the endpoint. Timeframe control -> <select> populated from GET /api/timeframes (6 {value,label}; old hardcoded ['1m','5m','15m','1h','4h','1d'] button row removed). Network proof: performance resource timing shows both /api/symbols & /api/timeframes requested with initiatorType:"fetch" (609 B / 518 B), so the <select> is genuinely endpoint-backed and not merely the coincidentally-identical FALLBACK_TIMEFRAMES. Effective default preserved (BTC/USDT 1h shown; timeframeChoices guard keeps the active selection selectable; no value transform). UT-J-05 PASS (DOM + network inspection).

J-06.name: Warm-cache re-run works end-to-end
J-06.note: No regression from the iter-2 control rewiring (highest regression risk alongside J-01). Re-submitted the same strategy with the same endpoint-backed BTC/USDT / 1h / 2024-01-01–2024-03-01 selection: second run completed, identical deterministic output to the J-01 run on the same cached data (-7.81% / 39 trades), no error banner, new run_id a5d18072 appended (5th) and appears in history. Byte-identical warm re-run confirms the single-Parquet warm-cache path (iter-1, anti-goal resolved) and determinism survived the new controls — no Binance re-fetch, deterministic. UT-J-06 PASS.

anti_goal_violations.anti_goal: OHLCV market data MUST be cached as a single Parquet file per (symbol, timeframe) — NOT one CSV or file per calendar day — and MUST NOT be re-fetched from Binance when a covering local cache exists.
anti_goal_violations.evidence: RESOLVED in goal-money-billions-iter-1; UNCHANGED in iter-2 (frontend-only iteration, no backend file touched — git diff shows only apps/frontend/src/components/BacktestConfigBar.tsx modified). apps/backend/data/loader.py single-file {cache}/{safe_symbol}/{timeframe}.parquet; per-day helpers + day loop removed; covering-cache zero Binance calls; atomic os.replace. iter-2 J-06 byte-identical warm re-run re-corroborates the warm-cache path still works (no re-fetch, deterministic).

anti_goal_violations.anti_goal: BACKTEST_STORE_DIR (session/run history) MUST NOT default to a volatile /tmp path; session and run history MUST survive a process restart.
anti_goal_violations.evidence: RESOLVED in goal-money-billions-iter-1; UNCHANGED in iter-2 (frontend-only iteration, session_store.py not touched — git diff confirms). apps/backend/backend/session_store.py: _DEFAULT_STORE_DIR = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[3] / '.data' / 'backtests'; absolute, not under /tmp, resolves to <repo>/.data/backtests holding the existing live sessions. iter-2 J-02 re-corroborates server-side persistence (prior session reloaded full detail from the durable store).

anti_goal_violations.anti_goal: GET /api/sessions/{id} (the list/open path) MUST NOT eagerly parse full per-iteration result.json/rating.json payloads; iteration detail is lazy-loaded via the existing per-iteration endpoint.
anti_goal_violations.evidence: STILL UNRESOLVED. CODE-CONFIRMED in iter-1 (apps/backend/backend/session_routes.py:142-171 get_session calls read_iteration_full per iteration, inlining result.json/rating.json). NOT introduced by iter-2 — iter-2 is frontend-only (git diff: only BacktestConfigBar.tsx modified) and did not touch session_routes.py, so this is unchanged/pre-existing, NOT a regression. browser-QA Observation #2 independently re-confirms the eager-load is still present. Explicitly OUT OF SCOPE for iter-2 and deferred by the iter-2 spec to a dedicated subsequent FULL-depth iteration (a frontend+backend session-open contract change with J-02 regression risk). Minor severity (performance/efficiency; no secret/paid-SaaS/license/backdoor). BLOCKS GOAL_ACHIEVED until resolved.
